title: APEX World 2026 Kicks Off March 26–27 in the Netherlands
summary: The 16th edition of APEX World takes place March 26–27 at ReeHorst, Ede, Netherlands. Four parallel tracks with keynotes from Marc Sewtz, Monica Godoy, Menno Hoogendijk, and Connor McDonald. Expected demos of APEX 26.1 features and APEXlang — a new text-based format for describing APEX applications, optimized for AI and version control.

title: Oracle launches 22 Fusion Agentic Applications — AI agents for finance, HR, and supply chain
summary: At Oracle AI World in London on March 24, 2026, Oracle unveiled 22 new Fusion Agentic Applications — enterprise apps driven by coordinated teams of specialized AI agents. Also announced: Agentic Applications Builder — a no-code environment for building AI agents with workflow orchestration, contextual memory, and ROI measurement.

title: Ukraine bans 27 Russian-linked software products including 1C and BAS
summary: Ukraine's State Service for Special Communications published an updated list of banned software, including 27 products from 1C and BAS. The ban applies to government agencies, institutions, and critical infrastructure. For businesses still running 1C, this is a clear signal: it's time to migrate to secure alternatives like Oracle APEX, Microsoft Dynamics, or Ukrainian-built solutions.

title: NTT DATA and NVIDIA launch enterprise AI factories for production-scale AI
summary: NTT DATA announced an initiative to deliver NVIDIA-powered enterprise AI factories for corporate clients worldwide. The platform enables secure AI adoption with measurable ROI. The trend confirms: major enterprise players are moving from AI experiments to industrial-scale deployment.
